title: Charge Jump!
body:
**This is originally for modpack [AnimateCraft: Lankeren](https://modrinth.com/modpack/animatecraft-lankeren). If you like this content, play it in the modpack to gain the best experience!**

---
Are you often annoyed when you accidently fall in a 2-blocks-high gap and have to sacrifice one of your block to get you out of there? Well now you don't have to!

This mod adds a Chinese Kung-fu to your vanilla game! Press x(by default) to toggle Charge Jump mode,and sneak for about 2 seconds, when you see the clouds under your feet burst out, it's time to jump!

![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AjfMeEPz/images/b1213ccae5c640293d5ee88608911bc3d50eaf58.gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AjfMeEPz/images/b1213ccae5c640293d5ee88608911bc3d50eaf58.gif)
## Credit:
Inspired by Swisle's [Sneaking High Jump](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/sneaking-high-jump/) data pack, which support more versions and loaders!
